text: I find myself inside a sleek, modern environment, all clean lines and glass. Upon entering deeper, I am confronted by a vibrant display dedicated to R+D—responsive and rapidly evolving development. Words and screens speak about innovation, research, and the convergence of humanity with technology. The world here feels curated, purposeful, and humming with the promise of progress. I feel a mix of admiration for the clever design, and an uneasy reflection on our growing reliance on the technological unknown. My curiosity is piqued, but I also sense a kind of existential tension in these carefully crafted spaces.
